title: clematis alpina var. japonica
intro: Clematis alpina var. japonica is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family, known for its fragrant, bell-shaped flowers and edible properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, fever, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis alpina var. japonica include its ability to reduce inflammation, aid in digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, and are also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
